posts.text:
Arrests. Now!


James O'Keefe (@JamesOKeefeIII)

MUST WATCH: Petitioners breaking the law in this video and paying for signatures on ballot petitions threaten @anthonyjrubin of @realmuckraker and drive him out of MacArthur Park.

It’s extremely rare to capture all these criminal transactions on video.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/JamesOKeefeIII/status/2034767239904203166#m

.@AGPamBondi and @DAGToddBlanche have WILLINGLY come before the Oversight committee for a closed briefing to answer ANY and ALL questions Members have for them. 

Democrats all just stormed out after refusing to ask questions because the cameras are off.

Nothing is ever good enough for these theatrical fools.

How ‘bout, NO! 

LAST time we were forced to pass FISA 
(attached to a bill “for the troops”) I was promised “NEXT TIME” we would END warrantless spying on American citizens. 

Get FISA right before it comes to the Floor!


Craig Caplan (@CraigCaplan)

Speaker Johnson: "My plan is to move a clean extension of FISA...It expires in April (19) and we're looking at that deadline and hoping that we can get a clean authorization for at least 18 months."





— https://nitter.net/CraigCaplan/status/203

If @JohnFetterman votes against the SAVE America Act, I never want to hear "he's a reasonable democrat" again.

You can't be reasonable and support illegal aliens hijacking our elections.

Last night at the Oscars, Hollywood celebrities gave shoutouts to “Free Palestine” while using the stage for political activism.

Meanwhile, the brave Americans who recently gave their lives serving this country weren’t mentioned at all.

Hollywood doesn’t reflect real America.

Thanks Chuck, that’s the point!


TheBlaze (@theblaze)

Schumer on the Save America Act: “It allows ICE to kick tens of millions of people off the voter rolls!”

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/theblaze/status/2031498178135052781#m

The same “GOP” senators who voted to keep giving welfare to noncitizens are now opposing passage of the SAVE America Act via standing filibuster.

DO YOU GET IT!?

There’s a difference between bringing a bill to the floor and whipping the votes. 

Standing filibuster or bust.


Leader John Thune (@LeaderJohnThune)

Next week, I will bring the SAVE America Act to the floor. Senate Democrats will be forced to defend their outrageous positions on these issues and explain to the American people why common sense and the Democrat Party have parted ways.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/LeaderJohnThune/status/2032114734489555102#m
